name: Mushroom Duxelle
recipeIngredient: 1 pound Kennett Square mushrooms, minced very fine
recipeInstructions:
STEP ONE: Prepare the Beurre Manie--
To make Beurre Manie, rub 2 tablespoons butter and 2 tablespoons flour together in your hands to form small balls.
STEP TWO:
Mince the mushrooms very fine. Combine all the ingredients, except the Beurre Manie, and boil until almost dry. Remove from heat and stir in the Beurre Manie to thicken the mixture. Do not allow the mixture to boil after you have added the Beurre Manie to it.
